$comment: PA ZIP → legislative district lookup powering the 'Find my reps' input on /elected-officials. DEMO coverage only — currently maps a handful of ZIPs to the four PA Senate districts in the seed roster (SD-40, SD-18, SD-46, SD-7). House district mapping is intentionally null in this scaffold; will be populated when fetch_officials.py covers the House. Real coverage source candidates: PA Department of State district lookup, ProPublica Congress API derivatives, or geocoded boundaries from PASDA. Each entry: { senate: 'SD-XX' | null, house: 'HD-XXX' | null }.
